chunks.text: What's up guys, you guys are back in the Sigma Web Development course

chunks.text: Now, we'll talk about how to open, close, and structure a website

chunks.text: So in this folder, I'll create a folder called Video3

chunks.text: But the theme is our choice

chunks.title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website Sigma Web Development

chunks.title: Basic Structure of an HTML Website Sigma Web Development
